title: Computer Systems Design Services

sources.title: 2022 NAICS Definition: 541512 Computer Systems Design Services
sources.what_it_supports: Scope context only: the packet remains limited to the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype and does not make a NAICS-wide economic claim.

narrative.executive_view: This packet is limited to the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype. Target-company financial, operational, transaction, and succession evidence was not supplied, so primitive economic inputs remain explicitly unresolved or assumption-bounded rather than inferred from broader industry data.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target-company accrual revenue policy, trailing-twelve-month ledger, gross-versus-net presentation, vendor invoice set, or contract-level pass-through reconciliation was supplied. Recognized revenue and controllable value-added revenue therefore remain MISSING; gross billings are not substituted.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen class-neutral cash-cost taxonomy is preserved without substituting the broad 5415 occupation mix. Cash-cost amounts and role removability are bounded assumptions only, not observations of technical labor productivity or automation outcomes.
narrative.implementation: No project-level systems-integration evidence established implementation sequencing, client-access constraints, security controls, remediation burden, or a five-year operational-realization path. Realization and investment schedules remain MISSING rather than using generic software or managed-services benchmarks.
narrative.commercial_capture: No target-archetype evidence established the controllable-value-added mix, repeat-project exposure, renewal mechanics, contractual pass-through, repricing, or competitive response. Commercial-retention schedules therefore remain MISSING and are not conflated with implementation execution.
narrative.buyability: The supplied materials do not document marketed, accessible, diligenced, won, closed, and fully onboarded U.S. project-led targets in the stated EBITDA band. Sale availability, access/win, and the two distinct buyer capacities remain MISSING.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No comparable closed-deal entry evidence or state-consistent downside-exit evidence was supplied for the frozen archetype. The entry-equivalent normalized year-five state and closed multiple construct remain MISSING; no MSP or software-company valuation proxy is inserted.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive target baseline service basket or evidence on owner-dependent sales, architecture, partner status, delivery governance, and client escalation was supplied. Constant-price operator-controlled demand survival remains MISSING rather than represented by a scalar estimate.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: Selection uncertainty is frozen as true, and the value basis is explicitly source-free assumption mode. The critical missing target evidence prevents defensible numerical research conclusions and requires future work to obtain the named target-level records before any economics are finalized.

scenario_narratives.low: No coherent downside primitive bundle can be formed because revenue, pass-through, implementation, commercial, buyability, valuation, and survival evidence are unresolved. Assumption-bounded labor inputs are not used to invent a downside result.
scenario_narratives.base: The base case remains unformed: the packet preserves the frozen assumption-only cost structure but does not impute target revenue, cash costs, realization, commercial retention, capacity, valuation, or survival from broad industry sources.
scenario_narratives.high: No upside primitive bundle is asserted. Missing target-archetype evidence is not converted into optimistic endpoints, and no sponsor transformation, privileged access, multiple expansion, or new-demand survival is assumed.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-company accrual recognized-revenue evidence was supplied.
caveats: Gross billings are not a replacement for reconciled controllable value-added revenue.

evidence.rationale: No target ledger, invoice, or contract reconciliation was supplied.
caveats: An empty authored pass-through list does not establish that pass-through is absent.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Cash compensation and associated removable cash burden; excludes denominator pass-through.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free placeholder for the frozen assumption basis; it is not a measured target cost amount.
caveats: Requires target payroll and benefits records before use.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Controlled delivery contractor cash cost only; excludes documented outside-provider pass-through.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free placeholder for the frozen assumption basis; it is not a measured target contractor cost amount.
caveats: Requires target contractor ledgers and project controls before use.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen architecture role.
Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen implementation role.
Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen project-control role.
Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen support role.
Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen commercial role.
Source-free bounded judgment for the frozen corporate role.

deal_execution_capacity_5y.rationale: No buyer deal-execution capacity evidence was supplied.

integration_onboarding_capacity_5y.rationale: No buyer integration-and-onboarding capacity evidence was supplied.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No evidence was supplied to establish the closed entry-equivalent year-five state.

anchor.rationale: No entry-equivalent comparable-multiple anchor evidence was supplied.

operator_controlled_value_added_demand_s.rationale: No exhaustive target baseline service basket or year-five named-operator quantities were supplied.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet retains only the frozen project-led systems-integrator archetype and makes no NAICS-wide claim.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: Revenue and pass-through are MISSING; no undocumented amount is deducted or placed in the cash-cost pool.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role fractions address removable cash cost only and do not encode pricing, implementation, commercial response, or survival.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment is unresolved and is not shifted into commercial retention or valuation.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is unresolved and remains separate from operational realization and survival.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Access/win and entry valuation are independently MISSING; no price discount is embedded in buyer access.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The required closed state structure is present but MISSING, so no state mutation or alternate valuation channel is asserted.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed exclusion map removes commercial retention and survival from the multiple construct.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The required fixed-base assertions are preserved, but no unsupported basket is fabricated.

top_uncertain_inputs.range: MISSING pending target ledger, contracts, invoices, and gross-versus-net policy.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Without controllable value-added revenue, removable-cost and survival constructs cannot be finalized.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Target cash costs and role removability
top_uncertain_inputs.range: Only bounded source-free assumptions are present; target evidence is absent.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Assumption mode forces UNPROVEN readiness and cannot establish removable cash opportunity.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Implementation, commercial, buyability, valuation, and survival primitives
top_uncertain_inputs.range: MISSING pending target-archetype operating, transaction, and service-basket evidence.
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Missing primitives prevent a defensible factor, gate, or economic verdict.

reviewer_note: This is an outcome-neutral, assumption-and-missing packet. It deliberately preserves the frozen assumption-only role basis and does not manufacture economic conclusions from broader NAICS data.
